query:
SELECT DISTINCT subtype FROM (
                SELECT TRIM(BOTH ':-?, ' FROM UNNEST(STRING_TO_ARRAY(type_line, ' '))) subtype
                FROM scryfall_data
            ) subtypes
            WHERE subtype NOT IN ('//', '-', 'the', 'of', 'and/or', 'you', 'you''ll')
            ORDER BY subtype ASC
